OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Lois Butler.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Donald Trierweiler is present.
Attorney Megan Yip representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.
This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of APR-15-2013 is vacated. JPT Elan Lambert, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
